title: Jurinea natmataungensis
intro: Jurinea natmataungensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, known for its unique medicinal properties. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammatory and oxidative stress-related disorders, due to its potential health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The bioactive constituents of Jurinea natmataungensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpene lactones, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Jurinea natmataungensis is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used to make extracts and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
